title: Fashion Designers
description: Design clothing and accessories. Create original designs or adapt fashion trends.

tasks.text: Sketch rough and detailed drawings of apparel or accessories, and write specifications such as color schemes, construction, material types, and accessory requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine sample garments on and off models, modifying designs to achieve desired effects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with sales and management executives or with clients to discuss design ideas.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select materials and production techniques to be used for products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide sample garments to agents and sales representatives, and arrange for showings of sample garments at sales meetings or fashion shows.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct and coordinate workers involved in drawing and cutting patterns and constructing samples or finished garments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify target markets for designs, looking at factors such as age, gender, and socioeconomic status.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with other designers to coordinate special products and designs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend fashion shows and review garment magazines and manuals to gather information about fashion trends and consumer preferences.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Purchase new or used clothing and accessory items as needed to complete designs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Visit textile showrooms to keep up-to-date on the latest fabrics.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adapt other designers' ideas for the mass market.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Test fabrics or oversee testing so that garment care labels can be created.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine prices for styles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop a group of products or accessories, and market them through venues such as boutiques or mail-order catalogs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Draw patterns for articles designed, cut patterns, and cut material according to patterns, using measuring instruments and scissors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Sew together sections of material to form mockups or samples of garments or articles, using sewing equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design custom clothing and accessories for individuals, retailers, or theatrical, television, or film productions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research the styles and periods of clothing needed for film or theatrical productions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read scripts and consult directors and other production staff to develop design concepts and plan productions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
